MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER based on previously-filed action, or, in the alternative, motion to stay pending previously-filed action.

Off calendar in light of March 8, 2019 order granting complex designation and single assignment for all purposes to Judge Anne-Christine Massullo. Consistent with that order, the demurrer or, in the alternative, motion to stay may be reset in Dept. 304 at the time of the case management conference set for April 5, 2019.
